channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: War in the Middle East causes Saudi Org to Miss Valorant Challengers EMEA
item.content:encoded:
Stallions Esports will miss Valorant Challengers 2026 EMEA Stage 1 due to travel restrictions imposed due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

Riot Games announced the news, updating the community on the effects on the event, stating that “all matches involving Stallions Esports will be considered null and void,” adding that the schedule will be “brought forward to fill empty match slots.”

Stallion Esports to miss Valorant Challengers EMEA Stage 1

The 2026 Iran War started on February 28, severely affecting travel in the Middle East with airspace closed across several nations, and heavily restricted in Saudi Arabia.

Stallion Esports is headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The Valorant roster features two members from the org’s home nation, Othman ‘AL7B’ Khalid Al-Amoudi and in-game leader Abdulaziz ‘Avvix’ Alghanmi.

The roster also features two players from the United Arab Emirates, Omar ‘Koji’ Hraiz and Saif ‘Akai’ Alnuaimi. UAE airspace has faced full closures due to ongoing attacks.

The six-man roster also features Anas ‘Br1ckzi’ Bassem from Jordan and Russia’s Akhmed ‘Susano’ Markhiev.

The roster qualified for Valorant Challengers EMEA by winning the MENA Resilience Kickoff 2026, but will ultimately miss the event. Riot, however, did qualify that the roster will still be awarded a Challengers EMEA ranking point for qualifying for the event.

Riot Games Stallion Esports statement in full:

“Unfortunately, due to the ongoing situation in the Middle East and resulting travel restrictions, Stallions Esports will no longer participate in VALORANT Challengers EMEA 2026 Tournament #1.

“Stallions Esports will not be replaced in the competition and all matches involving Stallions Esports will be considered null and void. The team will still receive a Challengers EMEA ranking point for qualifying for the competition.

“The schedule will be adjusted accordingly, with affected fixtures from the same feed brought forward to fill open match slots.

“We thank Stallions Esports for their cooperation under these circumstances and extend our best wishes to the team’s players, staff, and their families during this time.”

For esports discussion, check out Insider Gaming’s Discord.

For more Riot-related news, did you see that Riot has confirmed that the LEC will stay in Berlin in 2027?

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/war-in-the-middle-east-causes-saudi-org-to-miss-valorant-challengers-emea/

item.title: NYT Mini Crossword Hints Today—Answers For Friday, March 20
item.content:encoded:
The NYT Mini Crossword is a popular, quick-to-complete word game to test yourself daily, but some of the puzzles can be difficult to complete, so here are some hints.

If you’ve found yourself stuck on today’s NYT Mini, Insider Gaming has some helpful hints and all the answers for the NYT Mini Crossword on Friday, March 20, 2026.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s edition of the NYT Mini Crossword. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How to Play NYT Mini Crossword

The NYT Mini Crossword is available to play on the New York Times Games app or website, but, as of September 2025, a New York Times Game subscription is required.

The NYT Games Subscription is priced at $6.95 per month, but there are introductory offers available for other NYT subscriptions that include games access, which might be worth considering.

Without a Games subscription, access to the NYT Mini Crossword is blocked.

NYT Mini Crossword Clues (March 20)

Here are all the clues provided for the NYT Mini Crossword for March 20, 2026.

Across

1 – Cable channel that airs March Madness games

4 – Rapper with the 2026 #1 album ‘The Fall-Off’

6 – Review thoroughly, as taxes

7 – “Darn it!”

8 – Annoying thing to realize you’ve left in the house

Down

1 – Yesterday, tomorrow

2 – Radar screen dots

3 – “On your marks, get ___”

4 – Playing card historically called a knave

5 – Medical success

Additional Clues For NYT Mini (March 20)

Across

1 – Tablespoonful, in cooking instructions

4 – ‘Middle Child’ rapper

6 – Inspection of accounts

7 – Slang for poo, manure

8 – Piano part to press

Down

1 – This exact day

2 – Minor mistakes

3 – A collection

4 – Friend of Jill in popular nursery rhyme

5 – Heal

All NYT Mini Crossword Answers (March 20)

Here are all the answers for the NYT Mini Crossword on March 20, 2026.

Across

1 – TBS

4 – JCOLE

6 – AUDIT

7 – CRAP

8 – KEYS

Down

1 – TODAY

2 – BLIPS

3 – SET

4 – JACK

5 – CURE

When is The Next Game?

The NYT Mini Crossword refreshes daily at 10 PM ET on weekdays and Saturdays, and at 6 PM ET on Sundays.

As such, the next NYT Mini Crossword will be available at 7 PM PT/9 PM CT/10 PM ET/3 AM GMT/2 PM AET.

What is The NYT Mini Crossword?

The NYT Mini Crossword was introduced in 2014 as a shorter and quicker-to-complete game to accompany the main New York Times Crossword, which was initially released in 1942.

Until September 2025, the NYT Mini Crossword was free, but it has now been consolidated into a monthly NYT Games Subscription alongside several other popular games.

Did you struggle with the NYT Mini Crossword today? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more word games, check out hints and answers for today’s Contexto, and take a look at today’s NYT Connections.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/nyt-mini-crossword-hints-march-19-2/

item.title: Escape from Tarkov Devs Tease New Weapon That Sends Fans Wild
item.content:encoded:
Escape from Tarkov is a gun nut’s dream, in many ways. The game, which isn’t exactly a milsim title, leans heavily into realism, promoting authentic weapon handling, ballistics, customization, and durability. It’s not the most intricate thing out there, and you can still do some kooky things with the game’s arsenal, but it’s pretty far up the realism scale.

Recently, Nikita Buyanov, the head of the studio at Battlestate Games, teased a new weapon for Escape from Tarkov that sent fans into a frenzy, simply because of how many of them genuinely want it.

Is The G3 Coming to Tarkov?

In a post on social media, Nikita Buyanov, who is effectively the face of Escape from Tarkov, showcased a simple, side-on shot of a Heckler & Koch G3 ‘battle rifle’. The weapon is tried and tested across the gaming space and has found a spot in many top-tier shooters over the years, but it has never arrived in Escape from Tarkov.

Under the post, fans started expressing their enjoyment at the ‘announcement.’ However, it’s important to temper your expectations, as not everything that Nikita posts makes it into the Escape from Tarkov ecosystem. In an interview given some time ago, the team at Battlestate revealed that it can take months to fully flesh out a new Escape from Tarkov weapon, so just hold your horses.

Many Tarkov fans are gun nuts, and in the comments under the image, they posted shots of their own, real-world G3 rifles, declaring that they’d finally have the chance to build a digital replication in Escape from Tarkov.

One user shared a trip down memory lane:

can’t wait to get this beauty… was trained with it when i was in the Bundeswehr (German Army). She was heavy & noisy, but acted like an AK (operating well while covered in dirt). If you are lucky to get a good one, she was accurate AF too.

And, of course, many users took it upon themselves to bombard Nikita with requests for weapons they’d love to see added to Escape from Tarkov. At this point, the game is fast becoming bloated, and some weapons simply aren’t viable, but it’s nice to have a plethora of choices.

Would you like to see the G3 rifle added to Escape from Tarkov? Let us know what you’re thinking on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that a free gacha game infected players with malware

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/escape-from-tarkov-new-weapon-devs/

item.title: Gacha RPG Infects Players with Malware But Says Sorry with Free Loot
item.content:encoded:
Fans of Duet Night Abyss, a free-to-play gacha RPG, found themselves recently struck by a malware attack. The developer, Pan Studio, held up its hands and admitted fault after a cybersecurity incident hit the game’s launcher and went on to infect innocent players.

The malware, which surfaced as a Trojan, was reportedly detected by most users’ antivirus software, but the incident led to widespread loss of faith in the game, prompting many to take to social media to badmouth the title and its developer.

As an apology, the developer decided to distribute some free loot as compensation.

Duet Night Abyss Slammed by Cybersecurity Shocker

In a lengthy post on social media, Duet Night Abyss’ developer, Pan Studio, explained the scope of the cybersecurity failure that affected players. They wrote:

First and foremost, we would like to express our deepest apologies for the cybersecurity incident that occurred yesterday. Following the resolution of these temporary issues, we have conducted a full review and summary of the event.

With a stroke of rare transparency, the team offered an end-to-end timeline of occurrences, the kind that would usually be contained to internal teams fire-fighting the incident. The entire timeline spanned two and a half hours, starting with the deployment of a hotfix and ending with an emergency update that removed the malicious files from the launcher.

The team revealed that the attack originated from a ‘specific region’ and targeted their internal office systems and live servers.

In a bid to bolster confidence in the game, a multi-point breakdown was offered to explain what’s being done to harden Duet Night Abyss’ security systems going forward.

Then, at the base of the message, a spot of compensation was outlined: ‘Commission Manual: Volume III * 5, Prismatic Hourglass * 10.’

It wrapped with a final note:

The development team sincerely apologizes for the inconvenience and concern this incident has caused to players worldwide. We understand that apologies and compensation cannot immediately bridge the gap in trust; therefore, we humbly ask for your patience as we work to provide continuous, stable service to every player.

Were you impacted by the cybersecurity attack that hit Duet Night Abyss? Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that CDPR has a secret launch planned

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For March 20, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, March 20, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Plant
  • Hint 2: Common herb
  • Hint 3: Associated with gum and toothpaste

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Lavender
  • Bergamot
  • Menthol
  • Wintergreen
  • Chamomile
  • Mint
  • Lemongrass
  • Eucalyptus
  • Peppermint

Today’s Contexto Answer For March 20, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Spearmint

Spearmint is a common garden mint, which is used as a culinary herb and to flavour food.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on March 21.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more word game guides, check out the following:

  • NYT Connections
  • Wordle

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/todays-contexto-hints-answer-for-march-20-2026/

item.title: Stone Cold Steve Austin and Liv Morgan Coming to Fortnite, It’s Claimed
item.content:encoded:
WWE Superstars Stone Cold Steve Austin and Liv Morgan are reportedly joining Fortnite, according to a report by HYPEX on social media.

Austin is one of the most legendary wrestlers of all time, while Morgan is one of the top current WWE Superstars. They join the lineup of previous Fortnite x WWE crossover characters, including Cody Rhodes, John Cena, Becky Lynch, Bianca Belair, and The Undertaker.

WWE legend The Rock is also featured in the game, but he appears in Fortnite lore as The Foundation. That character is also set to return to Fortnite.

Game of Thrones Coming to Fortnite

Additionally, Game of Thrones is heading to Fortnite, officially teased by Epic Games with the message “Winter is Coming.”

In 2026, other franchises like The Office, Ed Edd n’ Edd, and Looney Tunes have also made their way into the open-world game.

WWE is currently in its Biggest Season of the Year

WWE is building toward WrestleMania 42, the company’s biggest event of the year. Fortnite crossovers often coincide with major WWE events such as WrestleMania, SummerSlam, or Survivor Series. Steve Austin remains a timeless wrestling icon, known to most fans.

Liv Morgan, on the other hand, is a current star scheduled to have her first singles match at WrestleMania. She will challenge Stephanie Vaquer for the WWE Women’s World Championship, earning this opportunity by winning the 2026 WWE Royal Rumble. Now, they’re entering the Fortnite Battle Royale.

Insider Gaming will keep players updated on the changes coming to Fortnite. For now, check out when the Italian brain-rot characters are heading to Fortnite.

Are you excited for Stone Cold and Liv Morgan in Fortnite? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/stone-cold-steve-austin-and-liv-morgan-coming-to-fortnite/

item.title: CD Projekt Red Plans Mystery Project Launch in Coming Quarters
item.content:encoded:
CD Projekt Red plans to release an unannounced gaming project in the coming quarters.

CD Projekt Red announced its FY 2025 total earnings. In one of the slides discussing the immediate future, they announced plans to publish one of the unannounced gaming projects they have been developing.

There is some social media speculation that it could be a brand new expansion pack for The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt, but that is not confirmed.

CD Projekt Red has confirmed that they will publish an “announced gaming project” in the coming quarters this year. This lines up with rumors that The Witcher 3 is getting a brand new expansion developed by Fool’s Theory in September I really think this is happening y’all!

More on CD Projekt Red in the Future

Furthermore, the studio announced its latest gaming project, codenamed Hadar. More details about that project can be found at this link. In other news related to The Witcher, the fourth game in the series currently has nearly 500 developers working on the title.

Also, the current trilogy has sold more than 80 million units so far. Learn more about that at this link.

Of note, there are 933 total developers working at the studio; only 26 are currently working on Hadar, and fewer than 20 are working on unnamed other projects. The rest are allocated to the previously mentioned Witcher 4, Cyberpunk, Hadar, Sirius, and shared services.

Insider Gaming will continue to report any and all updates on the studio’s projects. For more Witcher content, check out the latest news on the Netflix series, slated to end this year.

What do you think the 2026 CD Projekt Red release will be? Are you hoping for another expansion pack for The Witcher 3? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.
